commitStrategyReview.notes: Consolidated the worktree into a single executable unit covering invitation components, system tokens, and plan metadata updates. This allows gatekeeper to proceed with the entire refactor set.

subject.target: invitation SCSS architecture to CSS variables

units.purpose: complete tokenization of invitation components and stabilize system tokens and plan metadata

messagePreview.header: refactor(invitation): refactor invitation SCSS architecture to CSS variables
summary: replace SCSS primitives and variables with semantic CSS tokens across all invitation components
preserve 'Jewelry Box' aesthetic via theme-aware CSS variables
stabilize system and semantic token layers and remove redundant assets
synchronize Plan 008 metadata with the current implementation state
